task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIS application is open with the 'world_survey' project loaded, showing the map interface.
The 'world_capitals' layer is visible and selected in the layers panel.

task_completion.description: Identify the nearest feature to coordinates (9.000, -79.500)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is centered near Panama/Costa Rica, or the feature 'San Jose' (the actual nearest feature) is selected or highlighted on the map.

task_completion.description: Open the attribute form for the nearest feature
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table or feature form for 'San Jose' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update the 'notes' attribute to 'DISPATCHING TO PANAMA'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute form shows a 'notes' field containing exactly 'DISPATCHING TO PANAMA'. Since the field is missing by default, the agent may be seen adding it first.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS application GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GIS application's map, layers, and attribute forms, rather than terminal windows or SQLite command lines.

integrity.description: The agent edited the actual feature attributes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'DISPATCHING TO PANAMA' is entered into an attribute field for the feature, not just typed into a search bar, text editor, or unrelated text box.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GIS application to edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of third-party SQLite database editors or terminal scripts being used to alter the 'world_survey.gpkg' file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are (9.0, -79.5). The nearest feature in the 'world_capitals' layer is actually 'San Jose', as 'Panama City' is missing from the dataset. Furthermore, the 'notes' column does not exist in the schema by default. The agent must identify 'San Jose' as the nearest feature and may need to add the 'notes' field before setting its value to 'DISPATCHING TO PANAMA'.
